message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (field-controlled-alloc-size): the resource's extent field 'psmgr_session.desc' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion. [mechanism:field-controlled-alloc-size;indicates=WMI-2] [mem:struct=psmgr_session;field=desc;offset=40] [oracle:assert=psmgr_session.desc is interpreted consistently across all live consumers;assume=resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models]
